chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1312 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of matter 1. For orders on CMA No.391/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.11/2024 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on statement dated 11.01.2024 (Withdrawal) 4. For orders on CMA No.12/2024 (Review) 30.01.2024 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. None present for petitioner/applicant. It appears that learned Counsel for petitioner has already filed a statement dated 11.01.2024, duly supported by an affidavit of petitioner, whereby he has submitted that he does not press the instant review application. Accordingly, the review application is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
